auth.emailError: Enter a valid email address (must include @).
auth.passwordPlaceholder: Min 8 chars, uppercase, number or symbol
auth.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and a number or special character
auth.passwordError: Use at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and a number or special character.
auth.termsConsent: I agree to the <terms>Terms of use</terms> and <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>. I understand my data will be used only to connect me with advertisers and users on the platform.
auth.termsConsentError: Please accept the terms and privacy policy to continue.
auth.selectedPlanBanner: You selected the {{plan}} plan. It will be linked to your account after you complete registration.
auth.loginLinkSend: Send me a login link instead
auth.loginLinkSent: Login link sent. Open your email and click the link (valid for 30 minutes).
auth.loginLinkSendError: We could not send the login link. Please try again later.
auth.loginLinkInvalid: This login link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.loginPasswordNotOnServer: Your account is confirmed, but the password was not saved on the server (for example if you verified on another device with an older link). Open “Sign up”, enter the same email and password, and send a new confirmation email — then click the link once. Or check that your password is typed exactly as when you registered.
auth.loginRemoteUnavailable: Signing in on another device requires the server database (Supabase). If you are the site owner, configure SUPABASE_URL and run the SQL migration. Until then, sign in on the device where you confirmed the email.
auth.loginNotRegistered: No account found. Registration is required before you can sign in as an owner.
auth.loginBlocked: This account has been suspended. Contact support.
auth.loginAccountDeleted: This account was removed. An administrator can restore it under Admin → Deleted accounts.
auth.loginWrongEmail: Sign in with the email address you used when you registered.
auth.nameHint: e.g. John Smith or Sunset Hotel LLC
auth.phoneError: Use international format starting with +38… (not 069… without country code).
auth.promoCodeHint: If you have a promo code, enter it here.
auth.verifyEmailOnly: Account verification is by email only — we will send a confirmation link to the address you enter.
auth.verifyEmailSendError: We could not send the confirmation email. Please try again later.
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Log in

home.title: RentAdria — accommodation & vehicle rentals
home.ogDescription: Find accommodation, cars and motorcycles across the Adriatic. Listings from owners — clear pricing.

verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.checkEmailInstruction: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click the link in the email (valid for 48 hours).
verify.checkEmailSpam: If you do not see the message, check Spam / Junk.
verify.anyDevice: You can open the link on any device — phone or computer. The same browser is not required.
verify.tokenError: This link could not be verified. Please register again or use the same browser where you started signup.
verify.tokenExpired: This confirmation link has expired (48 hours). Please register again.
verify.serverError: Email confirmation is temporarily unavailable (server configuration). If this persists, contact support.

cookie.message: We use cookies to run the site (essential) and optionally to measure traffic. Choose “Accept all”, only essential cookies, or customise.
cookie.customizeHint: Essential cookies cannot be disabled. You can enable or disable optional analytics.
cookie.essentialDesc: Required for the site to work: language, session, security.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Helps us improve the site with aggregate statistics. Not used to sell your data.

pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits you best. All plans are annual subscriptions.
pricing.selectPlanContact: This package is for display only. Contact us to activate it on your account.
pricing.loggedInHint: You are signed in. To activate a plan on your account, please contact support — online checkout will be available soon.

legal.pricingBody: Basic listing and browsing may be free. Featured listings and paid add-ons are priced as published. Final pricing and commercial terms will be confirmed before each purchase. For questions, use the contact details on the site.

owner.lead: Manage your listings by category. Categories you have not paid for are not shown here.
owner.blockedLead: Your account is suspended. Your listings are hidden on the site. You can only use Messages to contact the administrator.

onboarding.lead: Choose and activate a plan to unlock categories and create listings. Until then, your dashboard stays empty.
onboarding.demoNote: Demo: use the button on a plan to simulate payment and activate your subscription for one year.

basicPick.title: Choose your category (Basic)
basicPick.callout: Your Basic subscription covers one category for the whole year. Select accommodation, cars, or motorcycles — you can only publish in that category until renewal.

planSummary.basic: — up to 2 listings in one category, up to 2 phone numbers
planSummary.pro: — up to 5 listings per category, up to 5 phone numbers

owner.privacyNote: You only see listings linked to your account.
owner.subPlaceholder: This section is ready for content — we will fill it in step by step.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.notifLead: When a visitor sends an inquiry via “Contact the owner”, you can get alerts through the channels you select below.
settingsPage.howLabel: How would you like to receive notifications:
settingsPage.deleteLead: After deletion you will not be able to sign in. In production we would email a confirmation code.
settingsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

profilePage.title: Edit profile
profilePage.lead: Name, image/logo and contact are shown on your listings. The login email cannot be changed.
profilePage.avatarLabel: Image / logo (shown in the contact section on the listing)
profilePage.passwordHint: Leave new password blank to keep the current one. To change it, enter your current password twice (must match), then the new password once.
profilePage.errNewPasswordRules: New password must be at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and a number or symbol.
profilePage.errOldMismatch: The two current password fields must match.
profilePage.errAvatarTooLarge: Image is too large after processing. Try another file.

inquiriesPage.title: Visitor inquiries
inquiriesPage.lead: Messages sent via “Contact the owner” on your listings (all categories).

messagesPage.title: Internal messages / messages for admin
messagesPage.lead: Save notes for yourself only, send a message to admin, or set a reminder with date and time.
messagesPage.threadsTitle: Conversation with admin (click a topic for history)
messagesPage.errNeedSubjectBody: Enter a subject and message before sending to admin.

adsPage.title: Advertising
adsPage.introBody: For fair competition, each owner may have one ad per category (accommodation, rent a car, rent a motorcycle). If you advertise in several categories, you can book one ad per category. After an ad expires in that category you must wait {{cooldown}} days before applying again. The first available slot is shown after you click the request button, before payment. The ad only enters the publishing flow after payment.
adsPage.firstSlotLabel: First available slot for your ad:
adsPage.rulesHint: Ad duration: {{duration}} days. Cooldown before a new booking in the same category for the same owner: {{cooldown}} days after expiry.
adsPage.pickPlacement: Choose ad placement (you can select several)
adsPage.placementHint: Category sets which home tab (accommodation / cars / motorcycles). Checked placements put your published listing in the matching slot (main slideshow, featured strip, side columns). You need a published listing in that category for the ad to show.
adsPage.pl_slideshow: Slideshow on the homepage (for this category)
adsPage.pl_sideSlideshow: Slideshow next to the main slideshow
adsPage.errPlacements: Select at least one placement type.
adsPage.successDemo: Request simulated (demo). Slot: {{date}}. After real payment the ad goes into publishing.

forumPage.title: Forum
forumPage.lead: The forum is only for signed-in owners. Admin can monitor all topics. All owners see every topic — when any owner creates or opens a topic, every signed-in owner sees it. Topics cannot be deleted; only replies are allowed.
forumPage.empty: No topics yet. Create the first one.
forumPage.noDelete: Topics are not deleted — discussion only.

codePage.title: Enter code
codePage.lead: Enter the promotional code issued by the administrator. It will be saved on your account and applied automatically when your subscription expires — according to the rules the admin linked to that code (e.g. renewal discount, free advertising for a period, or another agreed benefit).
codePage.extra: You can keep one prepared code per account. Saving a new code replaces the previous one. If a code expires or the promotion ends, contact support before renewal. In production the code is validated on the server; here storage is local (demo).
codePage.errTooLong: Code is too long (max. 64 characters after normalization).
codePage.errRestricted: This code is reserved for another account.
codePage.errMaxUses: This code has reached its maximum number of uses.
codePage.errCountry: This code does not apply in your country.
codePage.errMaxPerCountry: This code has reached the maximum uses for your country.
codePage.errCategory: This code does not apply to your categories (plan).

listing.pickCategoryHint: Basic plan only opens the category you purchased.
listing.priceDailyHint: Shown as the main price on the listing.
listing.phTitleCar: e.g. Škoda Octavia for rent in Budva
listing.phTitleMoto: e.g. BMW F 750 GS for rent in Budva
listing.carExtrasIntro: For each option, mark it as included (checked). Leave the price at 0 for free or enter the amount in EUR (decimals allowed) — on the listing it will show as included or at the stated price.
listing.motoExtrasIntro: For each item mark it as included (checked). Leave the price at 0 for free or enter the amount in EUR (decimals allowed) — on the listing it will show as included or at the stated price.
listing.errFieldsCar: Enter make, model, year, transmission and daily price (fields marked with *).
listing.errFieldsMoto: Enter make, model, year, transmission and daily price (fields marked with *).
listing.emailNotice: The site sends automatic emails and messages about subscription expiry (1 month, 15 days and 1 day before).
listing.titleDescRequired: Title and description are required in at least one language — other languages fill in automatically after you pause typing (or when you leave the field).
listing.autoTranslateHint: You can type in just one language tab; the others are filled via automatic online translation. If nothing updates, check your internet connection or wait a moment and leave the field.
listing.phTitle: e.g. Villa with pool in Kumbor
listing.ownersHint: Enter your details and optionally one contact person.
listing.contactLimit: Up to {{max}} contacts for your plan.
listing.imagesHint: Add images via URL (one or more links) or upload from your computer.
listing.imagesDrag: On desktop: drag images to reorder. On a phone or tablet: press and hold a thumbnail (short buzz), then—without lifting your finger—drag onto another thumbnail to swap positions. X removes a photo. Uploads are converted to WebP.
listing.exportSocial: Post this listing on Instagram and Facebook (RentAdria accounts)
listing.exportNote1: Unless you enable this option, the listing will not be auto-posted on social media.
listing.exportNote2: When enabled, the listing is shared on RentAdria’s Instagram and Facebook.
listing.mapHint: After you choose country and city, the map centres on the city; then move the pin to the exact spot. (Map: OpenStreetMap; Google Maps link below.)
listing.mapNoMarker: Click “Centre on city” or remove the pin and place it again.
listing.helpModalIntro: Here is what each tab means — explained slowly, like to a friend. No rush: fill what you know and come back later for the rest.

helpTab.basic: This is where you describe what you rent: price, where it is, what it is like. First write a title and description in one language you like — like a postcard: short, clear, friendly. Then fill the fields with a star — those are required. If you do not know something exactly, write the closest guess (for example approximate size).
helpTab.owners: Here are the people guests can contact. The main owner stays in the table; you can add more people (for example someone who meets guests). Choose whether to show email, phone, or both. Use “Add contact” when needed and fill what you can — like a phone contact list.
helpTab.images: Add photos so people can see the place. You can paste links or upload from your phone or computer. On a computer, drag photos to change the order. On a phone, press and hold a photo until it vibrates, then move your finger to where you want it. The first photo is like a cover — pick your nicest one.
helpTab.export: If you want, the listing can also be shared on RentAdria’s social pages. Turn this on only if you like the idea. If you turn it on, read and confirm the consent on the “Owners” tab — it explains how contacts are shown.
helpTab.map: Show where the place is on the map. First pick country and city, then move the red pin right to the house or entrance — like placing a toy exactly where it belongs on a table. You can choose exact or approximate location if you want a bit more privacy.

listing.errTitleDesc: Enter title and description (in the active language), then wait for translation or fill in manually.
listing.errPayment: Select at least one payment method.
listing.errFields: Fill in required fields marked with an asterisk.
listing.socialConsent: I agree that the phone number(s) I publish for this listing may be shown on the RentAdria site and, if I enable it below, on Instagram and Facebook posts for this listing.
listing.socialConsentHint: Required when Instagram or Facebook export is turned on.
listing.socialConsentExportRemind: On the Owners tab, confirm the consent to show contact phone(s) on the site and social posts.
listing.errSocialConsent: Accept the consent on the Owners tab to show phone number(s) on the site and on Instagram/Facebook when social export is enabled.
listing.avatarAllListingsTitle: Owner: use profile photo on every listing. Contact: same contact photo on every listing.
listing.contactPhotoOwnerUseProfileInstead: Profile photo is used on all listings. Uncheck “Photo on all listings” to set a photo for this listing only.
listing.contactPhotoHint: Shown next to the name in the listing contact block.
listing.contactPhotoOwnerDisabled: For the owner row, use the profile photo under Edit profile.
listing.confirmDeleteContact: Remove this contact from the listing?
listing.cannotDeleteOwner: The primary owner row cannot be deleted. Edit it or add contacts.
listing.linkedHint: Tick “On this listing” only for people whose phone or email should appear on this specific ad. Other listings can use different contacts.
listing.imagesWebpNote: Uploaded files are converted automatically to WebP for faster loading.
listing.errNoLinkedContact: Select at least one contact to display on this listing (Owners tab).
listing.errListingLimit: Your plan allows up to {{max}} accommodation listings in this category. Remove one from the table or upgrade your plan.
listing.errBlocked: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.

admin.loginHint: Use the admin email and password configured only on the server (Vercel env: ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD, ADMIN_SESSION_SECRET). They are not embedded in the site bundle.

visits.heading: Site visits
visits.subtitle: Visits per day (Montenegro / Europe/Belgrade calendar). One visit = one browser per calendar day.
visits.loadError: Could not load visit statistics. On local dev, run the app with Vercel serverless (e.g. vercel dev) so /api routes work.
visits.emptyDetails: No geographic breakdown for this period yet.

listings.heading: Listings
listings.lead: Overview of all listings with owner ID. You can search by title, owner name, owner ID, phone or email; filter by category and country.
listings.editMockHint: Demo listings cannot be edited here.
listings.deleteMockHint: Demo listings cannot be deleted here.
listings.filterByOwnerHint: Filter table by this owner ID

owners.heading: Owners
owners.lead: Owner list: this browser plus server sync (Supabase) when configured. Save in the dialog updates the server too.
owners.hintXml: XML import URL, test sync and field mapping are in the Universal import tab. Here you edit plans and add-ons.
owners.hintPlan: Under Edit → Plan & add-ons, you can approve extra listings per category and extra categories regardless of the current plan.
owners.syncLead: Add partner sites that will receive or send listings. Sync can run for the whole site or per owner. Categories can be selected separately — partners may not support all categories.
owners.fldPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep current password
owners.fldValidUntilHint: Empty or invalid = no end date in DB (null). For a long free period use e.g. 2035-12-31T00:00:00.000Z.
owners.serverSaveError: Saved locally, but server update failed: {{detail}}. Check Supabase migrations and env.
owners.fldXmlHint: Link from the owner/partner. Use Universal import to test mapping; Sync runs a stub pull until backend is live.
owners.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this owner and all their listings in this browser?
owners.confirmSoftDelete: Remove this owner from the active list? Their listings will disappear from the site and they cannot sign in until you restore the account under Deleted accounts.
owners.noPublicListing: This owner has no published listing link yet.

deletedOwners.heading: Deleted accounts
deletedOwners.lead: Soft-deleted owners are stored here in this browser. Restore to make the account active again, or delete forever.
deletedOwners.retention30: Records are removed automatically after 30 days (or immediately if you delete forever).
deletedOwners.confirmPermanent: Remove this record permanently? This cannot be undone.

import.heading: Universal import module
import.lead: Paste a partner XML feed URL, pick an owner, run a test or full sync, and map XML fields. Add partners and site-wide sync below.
import.universalHint: Saving stores the XML URL on the selected owner. Sync uses a registered partner (stub until backend is live).
import.pickOwnerPartner: Select an owner and a partner.
import.mappingHint: Per owner, set which XML tag or path maps to our field. Leave blank if unused.
import.mappingNeedOwner: Select an owner to set up mapping.
import.supabaseNote: Duplicate protection: each listing must carry a stable external ID (e.g. partner listing id). The production pipeline will upsert into Supabase by that ID. Different XML shapes are mapped below before sync.

expiring.lead: Members whose subscription ends in the next 30 or 15 days. Contact them about renewal.
expiring.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this owner and all their data?
expiring.mailBody:
Hello {{name}},

Your RentAdria subscription is valid until {{date}}. Would you like to renew?

Regards

paused.lead: Members whose subscription date has passed. You can renew their account with a new term.
paused.confirmRenew: Extend subscription by one year from today?
paused.mailBody:
Hello {{name}},

We are writing about your RentAdria account.

Regards

engagement.lead: Totals come from real counters on listings: views when someone opens the listing page (once per session), and contact clicks when a visitor taps “Show contact”. No inflated numbers.
engagement.monthTotal: Contact clicks recorded this calendar month ({{ym}}): {{n}}
engagement.mailIntro:
Month {{ym}}. Total contact clicks (show contact): {{total}}.
Per owner:
engagement.ownerMailBody:
Hello {{name}},

Your registered email: {{email}}.
Month {{ym}} — listing views: {{views}}, contact clicks: {{contacts}}.

Regards,
RentAdria

banners.lead: Manual ads: slideshow, side banners, entry popup. Empty country selection = show everywhere.
banners.localNote: Banners are saved in this browser (localStorage). The public homepage only shows them here until we sync from a server — use the same browser to test, or deploy shared storage.
banners.title: Short title
banners.dropHint: Drop an image here or click to choose
banners.dropSub: JPG, PNG or WebP — shown on the site after save.
banners.dateHint: Leave empty for no limit. The banner stops showing after the end date (inclusive).
banners.dateInvalidRange: End date must be on or after the start date.
banners.pickCountry: Select at least one country or use “All countries” to target every region.

pricingAdmin.title: Pricing plans
pricingAdmin.lead: Edits apply to the public Pricing page for the selected language (stored in this browser until you reset).
pricingAdmin.hint: Changes apply immediately to Pricing, registration and checkout copy.
pricingAdmin.mapsHint: When set, choosing this card on the site activates the selected plan on the owner account.
pricingAdmin.confirmReset: Discard all custom pricing for this language?
pricingAdmin.confirmDelete: Remove this plan from the list for this language?

legalEditor.lead: Paste valid JSON: terms/privacy = array of {title, body}; FAQ = array of {id, question, answer}. Saving overwrites the built-in text for visitors in this browser.
legalEditor.leadSimple: Edit plain text. Saving updates the public page for visitors in this browser.
legalEditor.errJson: Invalid JSON or not an array.
legalEditor.errSave: Could not save. Check the fields and try again.
legalEditor.sharedBalkanPack: Editing the Montenegrin (CNR) language pack — same text is used for CG, SR, HR, BS on the site.

admin.subtitle: Key metrics: owners from the server (Supabase); the rest from this browser.
admin.statsNote: After Supabase migration 006 is applied, these counts come from the server; otherwise this browser’s local counts are used.
admin.placeholderSubtitle: This section is a placeholder — we will connect data and actions step by step.
admin.cardListingsHint: Public demo catalog on the site: {{n}}
admin.cardOwnersHintLocal: Supabase unavailable — local account count in this browser

promo.memberSearchPh: Search by name, email or phone
promo.errDuplicate: That code already exists. Generate a new one or pick another.
promo.exportJsonHint: Paste the copied JSON into Vercel → Environment Variables as RENTADRIA_ADMIN_PROMO_JSON (single line or minified). Then redeploy so production resolves the same codes as here.
promo.exportJsonDone: JSON copied to clipboard. Add it to RENTADRIA_ADMIN_PROMO_JSON on Vercel and redeploy.
promo.exportJsonCopy: Copy this JSON into RENTADRIA_ADMIN_PROMO_JSON on Vercel:

ownerMessages.title: Owner messages
ownerMessages.lead: Reply to owners within each topic. Owners only see their own thread.

inquiries.heading: Visitor inquiries
inquiries.lead: Messages sent via “Contact owner” on listings (all categories).

reports.heading: Listing reports
reports.lead: Reports submitted by visitors from listing pages.

reviews.heading: Reviews
reviews.lead: Saved reviews per listing. Expand a row to moderate individual reviews.

images.heading: Listing images
images.lead: Albums by public listing ID and owner. Blocked images are hidden on the site.
images.empty: No owner listings with images in this browser.

staff.heading: Staff and agents
staff.lead: Add demo staff (stored locally). Permissions will be defined later.
staff.name: Name
staff.roleHint: Sub-admin: full access except sensitive fields; can add agents. Agent: view only (future).

accommodation.subtitle: Apartments, villas and houses along the Adriatic and Mediterranean — directly from owners, no middlemen.

car.subtitle: SUVs, sedans and sports cars across 5 countries. Clear pricing — no hidden fees.

motorcycle.subtitle: Scooters and bikes for open roads across the Mediterranean.

hero.slideshowHintMob: Background photo changes about every 8 seconds. Tap a dot to jump to a slide.
hero.sideStripMobHint: Same feed as the left and right columns, in one row: auto-scroll like Featured, or drag to scroll.

instagram.captionBody: Looking for the perfect stay or transport on the Adriatic and Mediterranean? Connect directly with the owner and save on commissions.
instagram.captionPhonePlaceholder: (phone shown on the listing after “Show contact”)

search.placeOrKeyword: City, place or keyword in title
search.hintNoCountry: Type a city, place or keyword from the listing title, then press Search.
search.hintWithCountry: Pick a city from the list or type — Search filters titles and locations below.

footer.rateDisclaimer: Currency conversions are indicative only; actual rates may differ from your bank or card issuer.

listingPage.notFound: This listing could not be found.
listingPage.meta: Listed on RentAdria — contact the host to book.

description.text: One-bedroom unit with sea view. Bright, furnished, close to the coast.

prices.text: Nightly rate as shown. Security deposit may apply. Payment methods: cash, card, bank transfer.

contact.loadError: We could not load contact details. Check your connection and try again.
contact.messagePrefill: Hello, I'm interested in "{{title}}" on RentAdria.

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.hint: Only logged-in guests who stayed here can leave a review. Everyone can read them.
reviews.loginOnly: Log in to post a review.

inquiry.title: Send inquiry
inquiry.terms: I accept the Terms of use
inquiry.phMessage: Hello, I would like to ask about availability…

report.title: Report listing
report.hint: Please describe why you are reporting this ad. Admin will be notified by email.
